title: bistorta officinalis subsp. elliptica
intro: Bistorta officinalis subsp. elliptica, also known as elliptical bistort, is a subspecies of the Bistorta officinalis plant, a perennial herb native to Europe. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Bistorta officinalis subsp. elliptica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Bistorta officinalis subsp. elliptica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal compounds.
